events.raw_text:

Thu, Jun 5, 2025 · 5:30 PM to 8:00 PM CDT

55 E Monroe St suite 2950 c

55 E Monroe St suite 2950 c · Chicago, IL

dbt Global Circuit Series: Chicago

Hosted by Brian J. and Alexander L.

Chicago dbt Meetup
4.6
34 reviews
Details

This meetup is designed for builders, thinkers, and tinkerers — folks who want to roll up their sleeves (figuratively), learn from each other, and imagine what’s next for the analytics engineering stack.
Whether you’re curious about what’s new, want to see how others are approaching similar problems, or just want to ask hard questions — you’re in the right place.

Important Note:
Please ensure you register using your full name. This is required for security purposes, as you will need to present a valid ID matching the name you provided during registration to attend the event.

🤝Organizer: Analytics8
🏠Venue: 55 E Monroe St, Suite 2950-C, Chicago, IL 60603
🍕Catering: Pizza and drinks

To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation:** https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

📝Agenda

5:30 - 6:00 | Check in/Registration (30 min)
Laurie Merrell, Lead Analytics Engineer - Jarvus Innovations: "Civic Technology in Chicago: Intro to Chi Hack Night" (15 min + Q&A)
Dave Connors, Product Manager - dbt Labs: “For Builders, by Builders: The Latest Tools from dbt Labs” (25 min + Q&A)
Reception/Networking

Event Details:
The doors open at 5:30pm. Presentations begin at 6:00pm. Food and refreshments will be provided. Please bring your ID for when you check-in at the security desk in the lobby.
Our venue has capacity limits (55 people), so please only RSVP if you intend to come and change your RSVP status on the Meetup to "Not Going."

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
🤝 Make sure to join the #local-chicago channel in dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/).

***

dbt is the standard in data transformation, used by over 50,000 organizations worldwide. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust. Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

Read more

dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.

Important Note:
Please ensure you register using your full name. This is required for security purposes, as you will need to present a valid ID matching the name you provided during registration to attend the event.

Dave Connors - dbt Labs: What's in a n̶a̶m̶e̶ SQL Statement?
Michael Fagan - Snyk: A Series of Unfortunate Events: How A Snowflake Stream Flooded Our Pipeline

Event Details:
The doors open at 5:30pm. Presentations begin at 6:00pm. Food and refreshments will be provided. Please bring your ID for when you check-in at the security desk in the lobby.

Our venue has capacity limits (70 people), so please only RSVP if you intend to come and reach out to Abu Haidary if you need to cancel last minute or change your RSVP status on the Meetup to "Not Going."

events.page_title: Community AMA with Erica Louie (dbt Labs), Thu, Nov 21, 2024, 1:00 PM | Meetup
events.raw_text:
Skip to content
Homepage
Start a new group
30% off
Try Pro
Free
Become an organizer: create an event today!
Start now
Share a flyer

Thu, Nov 21, 2024 · 8:00 PM to 9:00 PM CET

Online event

This event has passed

Community AMA with Erica Louie (dbt Labs)
Network event

99 attendees from 54 groups hosting

D

Hosted by dbt L.

Super Organizer

Chicago dbt Meetup
4.6
34 reviews
Details

REGISTER HERE 👉 https://www.getdbt.com/resources/webinars/community-slack-ama

🚀 Hey Community! Are you ready to dive deep, get insights, and satisfy your curiosity?

We’re hosting monthly live Ask Me Anything events! It's the perfect platform to quench your curiosity and get to know each other better. Don't miss out on this opportunity to connect and learn together.

What to Expect:

Discussing trends in the analytics space
Sharing key takeaways from the recent events
Hearing your questions and thoughts

Speaker: Erica Louie, Data @ dbt Labs
Host: Bolaji Oyejide, Digital Community Mgr @ dbt Labs
Topic: Careers in data, building a data team, the dbt Semantic Layer, and scaling your dbt project
When: November 21st @ 2pm EST
Where: Virtual and in #dbt-community-merge

Erica was the second employee at dbt Labs, then called Fishtown Analytics and she's seen dbt grow, a lot. In this AMA, Erica will share more on her career in data, her strong opinions on building a data team, how she manages her team, the dbt Semantic Layer, scaling your dbt project, and more on her Substack.

Register now to get the link to watch and join the #dbt-community-ama channel in Slack to participate live!

Read more
Speaker
Erica Louie, dbt Labs

Second hire at dbt Labs, former Head of Data, and now leading the product data team (and previously worked for BuzzFeed's data team), Erica "ric" Louie proudly hails from a liberal arts background (studied political science + italian) and grew her career in data at dbt Labs starting from the ground-up. She firmly believes that anyone can be a data practitioner with the right mentors, resources (sans trivial data jargon), and a good sense of humor. While rethinking the philosophy behind data systems, operations, and teams is one of her favorite topics, she enjoys thinking and writing about the human experience, and how it intersects with the work we choose to do and who we choose to do it with.

🚀 Hey Community! Are you ready to dive deep, get insights, and satisfy your curiosity?

We’re hosting monthly live Ask Me Anything events! It's the perfect platform to quench your curiosity and get to know each other better. Don't miss out on this opportunity to connect and learn together.

What to Expect:

Discussing trends in the analytics space
Sharing key takeaways from the recent events
Hearing your questions and thoughts

Speaker: Alex Welch, Head of Data @dbt Labs
Topic: BI Tools & Semantic Layer
When: June 27 @ 4pm EST
Where: Virtual and in #dbt-community-merge

Whether you’re looking at flight data, sales figures, consumer transactions, or biometric stats — access to the correct sources + a well-trained user + BI tools + dbt = data that works!!
This month we have Alex Welch, Head of Data at dbt Labs, to answer questions and discuss more about BI tools, analytics trends & the Semantic Layer!

Register now to get the link to watch and join the #dbt-community-merge channel in Slack to participate live!

Thu, Aug 10, 2023 · 5:30 PM to 9:00 PM CDT

150 N Michigan Ave

150 N Michigan Ave · Chicago, IL

How to find us
Chicago dbt Meetup (in-person)

Hosted by Chicago dbt Meetup

Chicago dbt Meetup
4.6
34 reviews
Details

dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.

🤝Organizer: Analytics8
🏠Venue: 150 N Michigan Ave, 3rd Floor, Randolph Room, Chicago, IL 60601
🍕Catering

To attend, please read the Required Participation Language for In-Person Events with dbt Labs: https://bit.ly/3QIJXFb

📝Agenda:

"dbt with Sensitive Data" - David Williams, Slalom
"Getting Started with the dbt Semantic Layer" - Gwen Windflower and Dave Connors, dbt Labs

Event details:
The doors open at 5:30pm. Presentations begin at 6:00pm. Food and refreshments will be provided. The event will be on the 3rd floor in the Randolph Room. Please bring your ID for when you check-in at the security desk in the lobby.

Our venue has capacity limits (60 people), so please only RSVP if you intend to come and reach out to Amanda Harris if you need to cancel last minute or change your RSVP status on the Meetup to "Not Going."

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
🤝For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-chicago channel in dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/).
----------------------------------
dbt is an open source command-line tool that speaks the preferred language of data analysts everywhere—SQL. With dbt, analysts take ownership of the entire analytics engineering workflow, from writing data transformation code to deployment and documentation.

Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

events.raw_text:

Online event

This event has passed

Coalesce: The Analytics Engineering Conference
Network event

183 attendees from 16 groups hosting

D

Hosted by dbt L.

Super Organizer

Chicago dbt Meetup
4.6
34 reviews
Details

In case you missed it, dbt Labs is hosting Coalesce 2022 from October 17 - 21. It is the annual conference dedicated to advancing the practice of analytics engineering. Coalesce offers data practitioners an opportunity to deepen their knowledge and network. You can choose your own adventure including in-person, online, and hybrid experiences.

Coalesce Online (FREE) | October 17-21, 2022. The online experience that you know and love. Connect with data practitioners around the globe in sessions designed for North America, APAC, EMEA and LATAM regions. Catch live stream sessions from Coalesce New Orleans, interact with the community and speakers via Slack, and attend exclusively virtual sessions.
Coalesce New Orleans | October 17-21, 2022 | Located at the Hyatt Regency, New Orleans. Our first time together, in person! Attend a presentation, workshop, or panel discussion. Participate in activities, a hackathon, intimate discussions, and social activities. Meet community members and partners while exploring the history and culture of New Orleans.
Coalesce Online + | London, 20 October 2022 | Sydney, 21 October 2022. A one-day event taking place in London and Sydney, complementing Coalesce Online. This will include tech talks, hosted discussions, an Executive keynote and a post-event networking session.

⚠️Please note that Coalesce 2022 won't be hosted on Meetup.com.
✅REGISTER + SIGN UP for sessions here: https://coalesce.getdbt.com
📅Review the schedule here: https://coalesce.getdbt.com/schedule
⭐As a member of the dbt Meetup Network, please use your discount code MEETUP15 for Premium and GA tickets.

We are excited to help bring Chicago-based folks in the dbt Community together! Looking forward to socializing and seeing both new and familiar faces. Given social distancing, the space can accommodate just over 50 folks.

🙏 Please use you first & last name when RSVPing as the venue will cross-check Meetup.com registration names for this event with attendee identifications.🙏

✅Agenda and additional details below:
6:30-6:45pm arrival, nametags, grab water and snacks
6:45-7:15pm open discussions in pods

Join the conversation in the #local-chicago channel in dbt Slack!

Receive an invite to join the dbt Slack community:
https://community.getdbt.com/

COVID-19 Policy:
Any public space where other people are present holds an inherent risk of exposure to COVID-19 and other communicable diseases. By attending this event, I agree to voluntarily assume all risk related to exposure and agree to not hold dbt Labs or any of their affiliates including partners and sponsors, directors, officers, employees, agents, contractors, volunteers (“Representatives”) or venues liable for illness. I understand and agree that dbt Labs has an interest and obligation in protecting the health and well-being of dbt Labs Representatives, venue staff and other attendees; therefore, I agree that, if I’ve chosen not to be fully vaccinated as determined by my local country’s public health guidelines for personal, religious, medical or other reasons, I will only participate in a dbt Labs meetup remotely by watching live or via a recording, and I will not attend in-person. When in attendance in person, I will take necessary precautions while at the event in accordance with local and national health guidelines and regulations, which may include, but be not limited to, engaging in appropriate social distancing, wearing a mask in public areas when not consuming food or beverages, minimizing face touching, frequently washing hands and avoiding risky environments such as overcrowded bars or restaurants. I agree to not attend any dbt Labs event if I feel ill or have had recent exposure to a potentially COVID-19 infected individual. Venue may have other covid- or public health-related requirements in place, and I agree to abide by those requirements when disclosed by venue.
